raw_consumer_statement:
I write to follow up on Complaints XXXX of XX/XX/XXXX and XXXX of XX/XX/XXXX. Barclays responded to such complaints yet the issue of an overcharge on my account remains unresolved since early XX/XX/XXXX when I first contacted Barclays about such overcharge. Barclays ' measures have been temporary, reversed, and temporarily reinstated. Thus, the issue still remains unresolved. In addition to the documentation I have already provided Barclays more than once, I am willing to coordinate a conference call between the merchant and Barclays if that will help Barclays conclude its investigation or request any further specific documents it may so require. I am eager to conclude this matter and close my account with Barclays. 

I have called Barclays yet one number included in its last letter of XX/XX/XXXX is a wrong number and no person answers the " direct line '' provided in such letter. I have left messages and await a response. 

The time it is taking to resolve this matter is extraordinary.
